BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"0. I do not feel sad.","Q1":"0. I am not discouraged about my future.","Q2":"0. I do not feel like a failure.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"0. I don't feel particularly guilty.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"0. I feel the same about myself as ever.","Q7":"0. I don't criticize or blame myself more than usual.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"0. I am no more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"0. I have not lost interest in other people or activities.","Q12":"0. I make decisions about as well as ever.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"0. I have not experienced any change in my sleeping pattern.","Q17":"0. I am no more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"0. I can concentrate as well as ever.","Q20":"0. I am no more tired or fatigued than usual.","Q21":"0.
